meta.title: Cyprus Chauffeur Transfers — Premium Airport Service
meta.description: Pre-booked private transfers across Cyprus. Fixed prices, professional chauffeurs, meet & greet at the terminal.

hero.title: Land. We'll take it from here.
hero.subtitle: A private Mercedes and your own chauffeur, waiting the moment you land. Fixed fares across Cyprus — every detail arranged before you fly.

picker.hint: Airport, hotel or any town centre — point to point, anywhere in Cyprus.

items.title: Meet & greet at arrivals
items.desc: Your chauffeur waits with your name at the terminal — no calls, no searching.

items.title: Flight tracking included
items.desc: We monitor every flight. Delays do not change your fare.

items.title: Fixed price, no meters
items.desc: The figure quoted is the figure paid. Tolls and waiting are already in.

destinations.title: The Cyprus we drive.
destinations.subtitle: From Kyrenia's old harbour to the Karpaz dunes — fixed-price transfers to every town, beach, and old quarter.

items.desc: No meters, no surprises. The price you see is the price you pay.
Licensed, vetted chauffeurs with years on Cyprus roads — quiet, careful, and on time.
Early-morning departures, late-night arrivals — we keep your hours, not the other way around.
Reservation and confirmation arrive by email and SMS within seconds of booking.

items.name: E200 / E220
items.desc: The everyday Mercedes saloon — a cool, quiet cabin, chilled water within reach, and an unhurried drive at the fare you were quoted.

items.name: E220d / E300
items.capacity: Business saloon · up to 4 guests · 3 cases
items.desc: The latest-generation E-Class for arrivals that go straight into a meeting — supple leather, a hushed cabin, and a driver who watches the clock so you don't have to.

items.name: Vito
items.capacity: Group van · up to 8 guests · 8 cases
items.desc: Room for the whole party and every case — families and groups stay together in one Mercedes van, one fixed fare, one easy conversation.

items.name: V-Class VIP
items.capacity: VIP van · up to 6 guests · 6 cases
items.desc: Individual captain's chairs in white leather, room to stretch out — a lounge on wheels for the arrival that doubles as a first impression.

items.name: Sprinter
items.desc: The whole villa in a single Mercedes — weddings, retreats and tour groups arrive together, luggage and all, with no second vehicle.

howItWorks.title: Three steps from runway to room.

steps.title: Reserve
steps.desc: Choose your route, date, and party size. The fare is fixed before you confirm.

steps.desc: Your chauffeur is confirmed by SMS — name, vehicle, and direct contact.

steps.title: Arrive
steps.desc: You are met at the terminal and driven to your destination. Nothing further required.

items.quote: The car was waiting before our cabin door opened. The chauffeur took our bags without asking. We were home in forty minutes.
items.author: Anneke V.

items.quote: Booked in London at 1 AM, met in Larnaca by 8. The fare did not move during a delayed flight. That is what I pay for.
items.author: James P.

items.quote: I have used four chauffeur services in the Mediterranean. This is the first one I used twice.
items.author: Sofia L.

meta.title: About — Cyprus Chauffeur Transfers | TheTaxsi
meta.description: TheTaxsi redefines Cyprus airport transfers with fixed prices, professional chauffeurs and meet & greet. Discover our story and what we stand for.

about.title: Cyprus, considered.
about.subtitle: A chauffeur service built for the way travellers actually arrive.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: TheTaxsi was founded to solve a simple problem: airport transfers in Cyprus were unpredictable and stressful. Meters that kept running, drivers who didn't know the routes, prices that varied wildly. We built TheTaxsi to fix that — fixed prices, professional drivers, and a booking system that works.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To make every Cyprus airport transfer straightforward. You book, we show up, you arrive. No stress, no surprises.

items.title: Transparency
items.desc: No meter, no route padding, no 'airport surcharge' at the door.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: We monitor your flight. If it's late, your driver waits.

items.title: Professionalism
items.desc: Every driver is licensed, vetted, and experienced on Cyprus roads.

meta.title: FAQ — Cyprus Airport Transfers | TheTaxsi
meta.description: Everything about Cyprus airport transfers: booking, payment, flight tracking, vehicles and meet & greet. All you need to know before you reserve.

faq.title: Questions, answered.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before reserving a TheTaxsi transfer.

items.q: How do I book a transfer?
items.a: Fill in the booking form on our website with your route, date, time, and passenger details. You'll receive a confirmation by email and SMS immediately.

items.q: Can I cancel or modify my booking?
items.a: Contact us by phone or email as soon as possible. Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the transfer are fully refunded. Modifications are accepted subject to availability.

items.q: How far in advance should I book?
items.a: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance. For peak season (July–September) and early morning flights, earlier is better.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept cash (paid to the driver on arrival) and online payments via credit or debit card (processed securely through Stripe).

items.q: What is included in the price?
items.a: The price includes the transfer, tolls, parking, and up to 45 minutes waiting at the airport. Extras such as child seats are listed separately.
Yes. Online payments are processed by Stripe, a PCI-DSS Level 1 certified provider. We never store your card details.

items.q: How will I recognise my driver?
items.a: Your driver will be waiting at the arrivals hall with a sign showing your name. You will receive their name, phone, and vehicle details by SMS.

items.q: What if my flight is delayed?
items.a: We monitor flight arrivals. If your flight is delayed, your driver adjusts at no extra charge.
Yes. Use the Track Booking page with your booking reference to see your current status and driver details.

items.q: How many guests can each vehicle carry?
items.a: Our saloon cars carry up to 4 guests with cases; the Vito and V-Class take groups of 6 to 8, and the Sprinter up to 16. Tell us your party size when booking and we'll assign the right vehicle.
Yes. Select the VIP option when booking for a premium vehicle, complimentary water, and priority service.

items.q: Can I request a child seat?
items.a: Yes. Select the Child Seat extra when booking. Please specify the child's age in the notes field.
